hero.title: Level Up Your
hero.subtitle: Coding Journey
hero.description: Join the official ACM Student Chapter. We don't just code; we build the future.

about.title: An Open Tech Community
about.description: The chapter’s aim is to encourage students to get involved in computer science, and create a team of people that are interested in exploring the broad field of computer science.

chapter.title: ACM Student Chapter
chapter.desc: Official student chapter of the ACM at the University of Crete, advancing computing as a science and profession.

history.title: Est. 2024
history.desc: Built by students to foster a community of researchers, educators, and professionals.

events.title: Events
events.desc: Organizing a variety of technical workshops, hackathons, and talks to bridge theory and practice.

game_dev.name: Game Dev
game_dev.description: Our active lab focused on game mechanics and interactive storytelling.

more_to_come.name: More to Come
more_to_come.description: New specialist teams are being formed. Machine Learning and Web labs are next.

footer.description: Official Student at CSD UOC. Bridging the gap between theory and practice.

teams_page.title: Our Specialist Teams
teams_page.description: The subgroups of ACM UOC Student Chapter aim to engage members in specialized fields of Computer Science. Under the guidance of experienced coordinators, the teams operate in a highly collaborative environment with the ultimate goal of acquiring and exchanging knowledge and experiences.

game_dev.name: Game Development
game_dev.description: Are you into video games? Would you like to participate in the development of an electronic game? Then the Game Dev team is for you!

web_dev.name: Web Development
web_dev.description: Websites: a must for every business and organization. Learn to build modern, responsive, and robust web applications.

machine_learning.name: Machine Learning
machine_learning.description: Explore the basic concepts and trends of AI. We bring together everyone interested in machine learning and data science.

security.name: Cyber Security
security.description: Interested in real-world hacking? Words like vulnerability research and penetration testing pique your curiosity? Join us.

acmw.name: ACM-W
acmw.description: Promoting women's involvement in computing through mentorship events, workshops, and a supportive community.

stay_tuned.title: More to Come
stay_tuned.description: We are currently cooking new workshops and seminars.

game-dev-workshop.title: Game Development Workshop
game-dev-workshop.description: A hands-on workshop introducing Unity and C# basics for building your first 3D world.

ai-symposium.title: AI Ethics & LLMs Symposium
ai-symposium.description: Exploring the boundaries of Large Language Models and the future of AI research.

cybersecurity-ctf.title: Cybersecurity Capture The Flag
cybersecurity-ctf.description: Put your hacking skills to the test in our first competitive CTF event.

web-dev-hackathon.title: Next.js 24h Hackathon
web-dev-hackathon.description: Build high-performance web apps in this intense 24-hour coding sprint.

events_page.title: Our Events
events_page.description: Discover our upcoming sessions and explore the archive of past workshops, hackathons, and tech talks.

event_1.title: Intro to React Native
event_1.description: A hands-on workshop where we built a cross-platform mobile app from scratch.

event_2.title: Cyber Security 101
event_2.description: Exploring vulnerabilities and penetration testing basics with industry experts.

event_3.title: Game Jam 2024
event_3.description: A marathon session where teams built complete indie games in one weekend.

event_4.title: Cloud Computing Day
event_4.description: Deep dive into AWS and Vercel infrastructure for scaling applications.

event_detail.join_prompt_desc: Don't forget to snap some photos and upload them here.

about_page.title: About ACM UOC
about_page.description: We are a community of students passionate about Computer Science, dedicated to bridging the gap between academic theory and practical application.
about_page.mission_text: By organizing workshops, hackathons, and technical seminars, we provide a collaborative environment where students can network, acquire modern skills, and explore the cutting-edge of technology.
about_page.vision_text: We envision a vibrant student ecosystem where knowledge is freely shared. Whether you are writing your first line of code or you are an advanced developer, our chapter is here to support your journey and help you thrive in the tech industry.

team-members.title: Meet The Team
team-members.description: The dedicated students and faculty advisors behind the ACM UOC Student Chapter.

join.title: Become a Member
join.subtitle: Join the largest student tech community at UOC.
join.perk_1: Access to exclusive workshops and tech talks.
join.perk_2: Participate in hackathons and coding sprints.
join.perk_3: Network with industry professionals and alumni.
join.name: Full Name
